title: solanum indicum var. spathotrichum
intro: Solanum indicum var. spathotrichum, commonly known as the "Spathe-leafed Solanum" or "Solanum spathotrichum", is a plant species in the Solanaceae family, which includes over 2,800 species of flowering plants. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Solanum indicum var. spathotrichum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
